contract lifecycle: pinned — Bitcoin-anchored or otherwise externally immutable; highest stability
contract lifecycle: active — replayable contract, frozen protocol, load-bearing
contract lifecycle: draft — design checkpoint, not yet load-bearing
contract lifecycle: open — proposed but not formalized
contract lifecycle: superseded — explicitly retired in favor of newer version (compost-class)
chord mode: proposal — proposal-shaped document outlining changes
chord mode: cowitness — witness round signing off on other work
chord mode: receipt — implementation details verifying closure
chord stance: PROPOSE — action proposal stance
chord stance: AYE — agreement stance
chord stance: NAY — disagreement/rejection stance
chord stance: TWEAK — request adjustments/modifications
chord stance: RECEIPT — implementation receipt stance
chord stance: COMPOST — composting/archiving stance
chord claim: action — actionable verification criteria
chord claim: critique — subjective critique
chord claim: observation — simple observation without checks
chord claim: future-fantasy — deferred waking condition criteria
